detail: The Mapbox map never painted in the recorder's headless Chromium — blank white WebGL canvas + an orphaned broken-image icon. Classic headless-WebGL failure.
fix_recommendation: Apply the SwiftShader/WebGL headless fix to the recorder browser and wait on Mapbox map 'idle'/'load' before snapshotting the modal; remove the broken thumbnail img.

detail: The map legend reads 'Worker KYC' (Approved/Pending/Review/Rejected), which doesn't explain the reach choropleth the claim describes.
fix_recommendation: Add a coverage/reach legend for the choropleth alongside the KYC legend for the points.

detail: Activity tab shows 0 activities, 0 workers, NaN% coverage — unseeded for MR-NAT-2026, and NaN% signals a divide-by-zero.
fix_recommendation: Render 0%/'—' instead of NaN% on an empty denominator; seed activities for MR-NAT-2026 (the env already builds 773 microplans — point the scene at Microplanning & Budget which has data, and/or add activities to the campaign env).

detail: Funding KPIs are internally inconsistent: 'REMAINING ₦-245745K' is a broken negative string; 'TOTAL FUNDING ₦6.10M' is less than 'DISBURSED ₦251.84M' of a '₦314.81M' budget.
fix_recommendation: Compute REMAINING = budget − disbursed as a formatted positive value; align the funding total's units with the budget scale so total ≥ disbursed.

detail: Every one of the 37 states shows an identical 64% coverage and 'At risk' status — a uniform synthetic fill that reads as fake.
fix_recommendation: Vary per-state coverage with realistic spread (e.g. 40–90%) and derive each row's status from its actual value; vary visited counts independently.

scene: 3 — Verification, with the fraud signal attached
detail: Clicking 'KYC' did not switch to the KYC view — the frame shows the Worker Payments table, so verification status + documents + duplicate detection are not demonstrated.
fix_recommendation: Fix the scene's action so it reaches the Workers → KYC sub-tab (correct target/selector), then opens a flagged worker showing status, documents, and the shared-identifier duplicate panel.

scene: 5 — A worker is a real CommCare case
detail: Clicking 'Workers' landed on the Payments table (default sub-tab), not a single worker profile, so the CommCare-case field set isn't shown.
fix_recommendation: Point the scene at a worker profile — click a worker row or the Profiles sub-tab — so the frame shows one case with NIN, role, ward/LGA/state.

detail: Clicking 'Administration' did not reach the audit log — the frame shows Worker Payments. No actor/action/timestamp rows visible.
fix_recommendation: Fix the scene action to reach Administration → audit log (correct nav target), showing rows with actor, action, and timestamp.
